aws.codeartifact.resource.packages_exter.metadata_intent: Check that CodeArtifact repositories have external public publishing disabled (externalConnections should be empty array)
issues_found: Discovery describe_repository was used without required domain and repository parameters
Missing discovery chain: need list_domains → list_repositories_in_domain → describe_repository
Field path error: used item.repository.externalConnections but emit structure shows item.externalConnections
fixes_applied: Added list_domains discovery to enumerate all domains
Added list_repositories_in_domain discovery dependent on list_domains
Made describe_repository dependent on list_repositories_in_domain with proper domain and repository parameters
Fixed field path from item.repository.externalConnections to item.externalConnections to match emit structure
